primary_diagnosis:
POEMS syndrome ID 01/2025, confirmed by sclerotic bone lesions, Polyneuropathy,
monoclonal IgA lambda, elevated VEGF
question:
Recommended management for isolated local progression BWK 2 with otherwise stable VEGF
and systemic remission?
tumor_board_decision:
Recommendation: Given imaging and clinically largely stable findings and a single
moderately progressive lesion in BWK2, local therapy via radiation can be administered
in this area. Further follow-up assessments should be performed via PET/CT.
raw_vignette:
Age: 52
ECOG: 1
Primary diagnosis:
POEMS syndrome ID 01/2025, confirmed by sclerotic bone lesions, Polyneuropathy,
monoclonal IgA lambda, elevated VEGF
Secondary diagnoses / Comorbidities:
Allergies: none known
Activity parameters:
Date VEGF (pg/ml) M-Protein (g/l) Other
01/2025 1850 3,2 ID, multiple sclerotic lesions BWS
04/2025 620 1,8 post 4x VCD
07/2025 580 1,5 stable, PET/CT: regression of most lesions
Treatment and course:
01/2025 ID POEMS syndrome
02-05/2025 4 cycles VCD (Bortezomib, Cyclophosphamid, Dexamethason)
06/2025 Remission assessment: partial remission (PR), VEGF-decrease >50%
07-09/2025 Treatment break, follow-up monitoring
10/2025 PET/CT: isolated progression BWK 2 with otherwise stable findings, VEGF still
stable at 610 pg/ml
Question for the tumor board:
Recommended management for isolated local progression BWK 2 with otherwise stable VEGF
and systemic remission?
Tumor board decision:
Recommendation: Given imaging and clinically largely stable findings and a single
moderately progressive lesion in BWK2, local therapy via radiation can be administered
in this area. Further follow-up assessments should be performed via PET/CT.
